import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

def scatter_add(src, index, dim_size):
    out = torch.zeros(dim_size, src.size(1), device=src.device, dtype=src.dtype)
    out.scatter_add_(0, index.unsqueeze(1).expand_as(src), src)
    return out

def scatter_mean(src, index, dim_size):
    out_sum = torch.zeros(dim_size, src.size(1), device=src.device, dtype=src.dtype)
    out_sum.scatter_add_(0, index.unsqueeze(1).expand_as(src), src)
    count = torch.zeros(dim_size, 1, device=src.device, dtype=src.dtype)
    ones = torch.ones(src.size(0), 1, device=src.device, dtype=src.dtype)
    count.scatter_add_(0, index.unsqueeze(1), ones)
    return out_sum / count.clamp(min=1)

class GINELayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, emb_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(emb_dim, 2*emb_dim),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(2*emb_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(2*emb_dim, emb_dim)
        )
        self.eps = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1))
        self.edge_lin = nn.Linear(emb_dim, emb_dim)
    
    def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_emb):
        src, dst = edge_index[0], edge_index[1]
        msg = F.relu(x[src] + self.edge_lin(edge_emb))
        agg = scatter_add(msg, dst, dim_size=x.size(0))
        out = self.mlp((1 + self.eps) * x + agg)
        return out

class GNN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_tasks=128, num_layers=5, emb_dim=300, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_layers = num_layers
        self.dropout = dropout
        self.atom_embs = nn.ModuleList([nn.Embedding(200, emb_dim) for _ in range(9)])
        self.bond_embs = nn.ModuleList([nn.Embedding(50, emb_dim) for _ in range(3)])
        self.convs = nn.ModuleList([GINELayer(emb_dim) for _ in range(num_layers)])
        self.bns = nn.ModuleList([nn.BatchNorm1d(emb_dim) for _ in range(num_layers)])
        self.head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(emb_dim, emb_dim), nn.ReLU(), nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(emb_dim, num_tasks)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_attr, batch, num_graphs):
        h = sum(self.atom_embs[i](x[:, i].clamp(0, 199)) for i in range(9))
        e = sum(self.bond_embs[i](edge_attr[:, i].clamp(0, 49)) for i in range(3))
        for i in range(self.num_layers):
            h = h + F.dropout(F.relu(self.bns[i](self.convs[i](h, edge_index, e))), self.dropout, self.training)
        h = scatter_mean(h, batch, dim_size=num_graphs)
        return self.head(h)
